option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
############################################################################## # application-test.yml — Test profile configuration # # Activated automatically by @SpringBootTest and @ActiveProfiles("test"). # Overrides production values in application.yml to use in-memory / embedded # infrastructure — no real MySQL, Redis, or Kafka required. ##############################################################################
spring: application: name: payment-orchestration-system-test
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # DATASOURCE — H2 in-memory database for unit/integration tests # Replaces the MySQL datasource from application.yml. # H2 is automatically configured via Spring Boot's DataSource auto-config # when spring-boot-starter-test is on the classpath. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── datasource: url: jdbc:h2:mem:payment_test_db;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE;MODE=MySQL username: sa password: driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
# ───────────────────────────��───────────────────────────────────── # JPA / HIBERNATE — use H2 dialect, create schema from schema.sql # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── jpa: hibernate: ddl-auto: none show-sql: false properties: hibernate: dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect format_sql: false defer-datasource-initialization: true
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SQL INIT — run schema.sql on startup so tables exist for @DataJpaTest # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── sql: init: mode: always schema-locations: classpath:schema.sql
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # REDIS — disabled for unit/service tests (mocked via @MockBean). # Tests that need Redis behaviour (PaymentConsumerIntegrationTest) use # @MockBean RedisTemplate directly and exclude Redis auto-config. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── data: redis: host: localhost port: 6379
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # KAFKA — overridden per-test by @EmbeddedKafka / @TestPropertySource. # The placeholder here keeps auto-config from failing when tests that # exclude Kafka auto-config are loaded with this profile. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── kafka: bootstrap-servers: localhost:9092 producer: key-serializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer value-serializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonSerializer acks: all retries: 1 consumer: group-id: payment-retry-group-test auto-offset-reset: earliest key-deserializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer value-deserializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonDeserializer properties: spring.json.trusted.packages: "org.example.*" enable.auto.commit: false
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # SERVER — random port for integration tests; avoids port conflicts # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── server: port: 0
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # LOGGING — reduce noise in test output # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── logging: level: root: WARN org.example: INFO org.springframework.kafka: WARN org.hibernate.SQL: OFF org.springframework.test: INFO
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # APPLICATION-SPECIFIC — test overrides # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── payment: idempotency: # Short TTL for tests so keys expire quickly and don't bleed across tests ttl-seconds: 60 kafka: main-topic: payment-main-topic
